title: 30 minutes before the dump, my system saw it coming.
author: Next-Syrup6935
selftext:
I’ve lost count of how many times I’ve been blindsided by sudden dumps.

[](https://i.redd.it/31gdlfl3smwf1.png)

https://preview.redd.it/6cedx678smwf1.png?width=600&format=png&auto=webp&s=5d6c34b0429adbf5abd10dbb0a9ec2144415628b

Last week it happened again… or almost did.  
But this time I got a heads up from a system I’ve been building for months.  
It scans charts, reads headlines, backtests structure, finds potential trade, tracks sentiment shifts, all automatically.

The analyze I got: “High-risk collapse forming. Hedge or stay out.”  
3 days later, the market nuked.

Typically i'm not a great trader, but i'd like to call myself a decent one being in profit since 2019, this recent crash is typically where i'd lose, but this time I was already out. Journaling have helped me a lot throughout my career and now AI is having the same if not larger impact on my trading style. 

Mostly use it as a strong confirmation indicator still but it's been showing great results.
